Casely: Hi Mark! Noticed you left a Casely shimmery ocean case in your cart. It's perfect for expressing your unique style and protecting your iPhone. 

Don't miss out: https://casely.attn.tv/aE2NEEebNYHZ .
Which one do you think I should buy?
Casely: Do you see anything you like in particular or would you like me to make a recommendation?
Can you make a recommendation
iPhone an iPhone 5
Casely: For an iPhone 5, I recommend the Accept the Rose | Blooming Red Rose Floral Case. It's stylish and protective. Check it out here: https://casely.attn.tv/aDU4spdhXM-i
That case is not available for the iPhone 5?
Casely: I apologize for that. Unfortunately, we don't have cases for the iPhone 5. If you have any other device, I'd be happy to recommend a case for it!
What about the iPhone 15
Any new Collab products that are best selling?
Casely: For the iPhone 15, I recommend the Best Dressed | Red Houndstooth Case. It's stylish and protective. Check it out here: https://casely.attn.tv/aZVO8MaSJJsC

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items
